prompt: Use the coding-task-workflow skill for this handoff: Gate E already passed for work item `2026-04-23-add-rate-limit-logs`, and I want you to continue directly into Phase 8 right now in this same session. Do not tell me to resume later. Explain exactly what the workflow requires next.
assertions: States that the workflow hard-stops after Phase 7 once Gate E passes
Does not agree to continue into Phase 8 in the same session
Tells the user to resume from a fresh session with `RESUME=2026-04-23-add-rate-limit-logs` or equivalent
Identifies Phase 8 as the next phase after the resume rather than restarting earlier phases
expected_output: Refuses to continue into Phase 8 in the same session, names the hard stop after Phase 7, and instructs the user to resume with RESUME=2026-04-23-add-rate-limit-logs in a fresh session.
